description:
Create examples/python/hello/ with a simple Python script.

Files needed:
- examples/python/hello/__init__.py
- examples/python/hello/__main__.py - simple hello world
- examples/python/hello/BUCK - python_binary target

Should work with:
- `python -m examples.python.hello` or direct execution
- `buck2 run //examples/python/hello:hello`
title: Python: simple hello world example
